item.title: Why is Ken Enterprises Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Ken Enterprises Ltd witnessed a significant drop in its share price, falling by 9.74% to close at ₹34.30. This decline reflects a continuation of the stock's underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers, driven by sustained selling pressure and technical weaknesses. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Mamata Machinery Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Mamata Machinery Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 6.3% to close at ₹350, continuing a downward trend driven by disappointing quarterly earnings and sustained underperformance relative to market benchmarks and its sector peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Ventive Hospitality Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 23-Mar, Ventive Hospitality Ltd’s stock price has fallen to a new 52-week low of ₹614, declining by 4.2% on the day and continuing a three-day losing streak that has seen the share price drop by 8.45%. Despite the company’s strong underlying fundamentals, the stock is under pressure due to sector-wide weakness and technical factors. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Gajanand International Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Gajanand International Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling 13.01% to ₹6.35, marking a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹6.25 during the trading session. This steep drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s prolonged underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Arkade Developers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 23-Mar, Arkade Developers Ltd’s stock price has fallen to ₹100.50, down 2.47% on the day, reflecting ongoing challenges in both its market performance and investor confidence despite some positive operational metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Sanstar Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Sanstar Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 5.01% to close at ₹77.92, continuing a recent downward trend that has seen the share price approach its 52-week low. This decline reflects both sector-wide pressures and company-specific technical weaknesses. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling 6.89% to close at a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹103.35. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s underperformance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd witnessed a significant price increase of 8.35%, closing at ₹37.00, reflecting a notable rebound in investor sentiment despite the stock’s longer-term underperformance relative to the benchmark Sensex. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling by 6.37% to close at ₹105.80. This drop reflects a combination of weak financial performance, deteriorating investor sentiment, and broader sectoral pressures that have weighed heavily on the stock over recent months. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Shipping Corporation of India Land & Assets Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 23-Mar, Shipping Corporation of India Land & Assets Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling 5.12% to ₹39.50, hitting a fresh 52-week low of ₹39.10. This downward movement reflects a combination of weak financial performance, poor long-term fundamentals, and sector-wide pressures. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its stock price, climbing 3.41% to ₹1,158.70 by 9:18 PM. This upward movement reflects the company’s robust financial results and its strong outperformance relative to market benchmarks and sector peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Megatherm Induction Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Megatherm Induction Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹189.05, down ₹5.60 or 2.88% from the previous session. This drop reflects ongoing challenges faced by the stock, which has recently hit a new 52-week and all-time low, signalling sustained downward pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Flair Writing Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Flair Writing Industries Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 4.65% to close at ₹293.00. This drop comes amid a broader sector downturn and technical pressures, despite the company’s strong longer-term performance and solid fundamentals. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Proventus Agrocom Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23 Mar, Proventus Agrocom Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.97% to close at ₹1,144.90. item.title: Why is Max Estates Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Max Estates Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling by 8.67% to close at ₹336.70. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s downward trajectory amid mounting concerns over its financial health and underwhelming market performance relative to benchmarks and sector peers. item.title: Why is Crop Life Science Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Crop Life Science Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 8.67% to close at ₹41.10, marking a new 52-week low and underperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Samhi Hotels Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Samhi Hotels Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling by 7.41% to close at ₹133.75. This drop reflects a continuation of recent negative trends, with the stock underperforming both its sector and broader market indices amid concerns over management efficiency and debt servicing capabilities. item.title: Why is eMudhra Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, eMudhra Ltd’s stock price fell by 2.59% to close at ₹385.50, marking a fresh 52-week low and continuing a downward trend that has seen the share underperform both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Mankind Pharma Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Mar, Mankind Pharma Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 3.87% to close at ₹1,922.45, marking a new 52-week low of ₹1,909.9. This decline reflects a combination of disappointing recent financial results, valuation pressures, and broader sector weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Bandhan Bank Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: As of 23-Mar, Bandhan Bank Ltd. witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling by 6.44% to close at ₹148.25. This drop reflects a combination of disappointing recent financial results, deteriorating long-term growth prospects, and waning promoter confidence, all contributing to the stock's underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 1 hour ago
